productDisplayName: Puma Men Future Cat Black Shoes
description: Designed for everyday wear, Future cat Remix 2 shoes from puma embody excitement and energy for life. This Future Cat pair comes with stylish overlays on the sides. The outsole with horizontal grips make these shoes very comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making them perfect for urban wear. Upper Features a low-profile design made for wear and tear Premium leather upper for longer wear Bold form-stripe outlining Lightly padded tongue and collar for extra comfort Asymmetrical lacing system gives a snug Fit Textile lining with cushioned foot-bed for enhanced comfort Overlays on the heel cup with glossy look for maximum style Midsole Cushioned midsole for comfort and stability Outsole Rubber outsole for enhanced traction Rubber outsole embedded onto the heel counter for shock absorption Embedded puma Jumping Cat embossed on the rubber outsole Waffle pattern with horizontal grooves and brand logo in the shape of a lug for maximum grip shoe care Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
